title: arnica parviflora subsp. alata
intro: Arnica parviflora subsp. alata is a subspecies of the arnica parviflora plant, which is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family, characterized by its small yellow flowers and narrow leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Arnica parviflora subsp. alata include pain relief, wound healing, and reduced inflammation, making it a popular remedy for sprains, bruises, and other injuries. Herbal preparations of this plant include tinctures, ointments, and creams, which are often used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
